title: Karafka: consumer.consumed
description: A batch of Kafka messages was successfully consumed by a Karafka consumer.

processed.description: Number of messages processed in this batch.

processing_lag.description: Lag between message production and processing start, in milliseconds.

consumption_lag.description: Lag between last committed offset and newest available offset, in milliseconds.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, present on any event fired during a web request context. Merged globally by the Honeybadger agent.
